case_title: MIGUEL SANCHEZ PEREZ VS. MARVIN MALTEZ et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, MIGUEL SANCHEZ AS TO DEFENDANT MALTEZ, MARVIN AN INDIVIDUAL MALTEZ, CYNTHIA AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, MIGUEL SANCHEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALTEZ, MARVIN AN INDIVIDUAL MALTEZ, CYNTHIA AN INDIVIDUAL $11,426.37 PRINCIPAL, $154.16 INTEREST, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,881.03, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
